description_long: This is a modern, mid-sized city bus with a streamlined, rectangular body and a two-tone color scheme of mint green and white. The bus features large, dark-tinted windows along both sides, providing ample visibility for passengers and a sleek, contemporary appearance. The roof is equipped with several rectangular panels, possibly for ventilation or emergency exits. The front of the bus has a wide windshield, a central logo, and a set of headlights, while the rear is simpler with tail lights and a similar logo. The bus rides on four wheels with green hubcaps, and the side views reveal two passenger entry/exit doors on the right side. The overall design suggests a focus on urban passenger transport, with easy access and a spacious interior.
description: A modern, mint green and white city bus with large tinted windows, two passenger doors, and a streamlined, rectangular design.
description_view_0: Front view showing a wide windshield, central logo, headlights, and a clean, flat front fascia.
description_view_1: Right side view displaying large, evenly spaced windows, two passenger doors, and green wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view with a large rear window, tail lights, and a central logo, mirroring the front's simplicity.
description_view_3: Left side view with large windows and no visible passenger doors, emphasizing the bus's length and window arrangement.
attribute_window_arrangement: Six large, rectangular, evenly spaced windows on each side, separated by vertical pillars; windows are dark-tinted and uniform in size.
attribute_bus_manufacturer_logo: A circular logo is visible on both the front and rear center panels, but no readable text or specific branding is discernible.
